docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY ALLEN, BENJAMIN ERIC AL-RASHAD, YUSUF-ALI AS TO DEFENDANT CADELINIA & LEUNG  INC. DBA PRUDENTIAL CAL. REALTY BESS, MARILYN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-26-2001 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAILING TO DACELINIA & LEUNG INC. RETURNED SIGNED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-26-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-07-2001 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 PLAINTIFFS TO EITHER DISMISS MARILYN BESS OR TO SERVE MARILYN BESS AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALLEN, BENJAMIN ERIC AL-RASHAD, YUSUF-ALI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CADELINIA & LEUNG  INC. DBA PRUDENTIAL CAL. REALTY BESS, MARILYN MARILYN BESS IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE-NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
